elemental.description: A spellcaster who harnesses the destructive forces of nature and the elements. Preferred Weapon: Mace, Dagger, and Shield

left.name: Stormbringer
left.description: Stormbringers harness the power of the storm, enhancing their dominion over lightning and shaping it to their will. Summon a fierce Tempest to unleash chaos upon your foes awakening the storm, creating devastation in your path.

right.name: Farseer
right.description: Harness your spiritual magic, improving your spell casting capabilities and empowering you to call upon the spirits of your ancestors to aid you and your allies in combat.

nodes.name: Chain Heal
nodes.description: Heals the friendly target for 899, then jumps up to 20 yards to heal the 3 most injured nearby allies. Healing is reduced by 30% with each jump.

nodes.name: Lava Burst
nodes.description: Hurls molten lava at the target, dealing 519 Fire damage. Lava Burst will always critically strike if the target is affected by Flame Shock and its damage is increased by your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Chain Lightning
nodes.description: Hurls a lightning bolt at the enemy, dealing 279 Nature damage and then jumping to additional nearby enemies. Affects 3 total targets

nodes.name: Earth Shield
nodes.description:
Protects the target with an earthen shield, increasing your healing on them by 20% and healing them for 334 when they take damage. This heal can only occur once every 3 sec. Maximum 9 charges.

Earth Shield can only be placed on one target at a time. Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman.

nodes.name: Ancestral Wolf Affinity
nodes.description: Cleanse Spirit, Wind Shear, Purge, and totem casts no longer cancel Ghost Wolf.

nodes.name: Fire and Ice
nodes.description: Increases all Fire and Frost damage you deal by 3%.

choices.name: Spirit Wolf
choices.description: While transformed into a Ghost Wolf, you gain 5% increased movement speed and 5% damage reduction every 1 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

choices.name: Thunderous Paws
choices.description: Ghost Wolf removes snares and increases your movement speed by an additional 25% for the first 3 sec. May only occur once every 20 sec.

nodes.name: Frost Shock
nodes.description: Chills the target with frost, causing 280 Frost damage and reducing the target's movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Elemental Orbit
nodes.description:
Increases the number of Elemental Shields you can have active on yourself by 1.

You can have Earth Shield on yourself and one ally at the same time.

choices.name: Spirit Walk
choices.description: Removes all movement impairing effects and increases your movement speed by 60% for 8 sec.

choices.name: Gust of Wind
choices.description: A gust of wind hurls you forward.

nodes.name: Astral Shift
nodes.description: Shift partially into the elemental planes, taking 40% less damage for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Nature's Guardian
nodes.description: When your health is brought below 35%, you instantly heal for 40% of your maximum health. Cannot occur more than once every 45 sec.

choices.name: Encasing Cold
choices.description: Increases the cooldown of Frost Shock by 15 sec, but Frost Shock now freezes targets in place for 4 sec.

choices.name: Arctic Snowstorm
choices.description: Enemies within 10 yds of your Frost Shock are snared by 30%.

nodes.name: Healing Stream Totem
nodes.description:
Summons a totem at your feet for 15 sec that heals an injured party or raid member within 40 yards for 256 every 1.8 sec.

If you already know Healing Stream Totem, instead gain 1 additional charge of Healing Stream Totem.

nodes.name: Winds of Al'Akir
nodes.description: Increases your movement speed by 3% and the movement speed bonus of Ghost Wolf by an additional 5%.

choices.name: Planes Traveler
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Astral Shift by 30 sec.

choices.name: Astral Bulwark
choices.description: Astral Shift reduces damage taken by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Brimming with Life
nodes.description:
Stamina increased by 8%.

While you are at full health, Reincarnation cools down 50% faster.

nodes.name: Wind Shear
nodes.description: Disrupts the target's concentration with a burst of wind, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec.

nodes.name: Elemental Resistance
nodes.description: Healing from Healing Stream Totem reduces Fire, Frost, and Nature damage taken by 6% for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Earthgrab Totem
nodes.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 20 sec. The totem pulses every 2 sec, rooting all enemies within 8 yards for 8 sec. Enemies previously rooted by the totem instead suffer 50% movement speed reduction.

nodes.name: Capacitor Totem
nodes.description: Summons a totem at the target location that gathers electrical energy from the surrounding air and explodes after 2 sec, stunning all enemies within 8 yards for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Spiritual Awakening
nodes.description: Mastery increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Enhanced Imbues
nodes.description: The effects of your weapon and shield imbues are increased by 30%.

nodes.name: Windveil
nodes.description: Interrupting a spell with Wind Shear reduces all spell damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Refreshing Waters
nodes.description: Your Healing Surge is 25% more effective on yourself.

nodes.name: Cleanse Spirit
nodes.description: Removes all Curse effects from a friendly target.

nodes.name: Static Charge
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Capacitor Totem by 10 sec.

nodes.name: Wind Rush Totem
nodes.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 15 sec, continually granting all allies who pass within 10 yards 40% increased movement speed for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Earth Elemental
nodes.description: Calls forth a Greater Earth Elemental to protect you and your allies, generating high threat and taunting enemies periodically for 30 sec.

choices.name: Purge
choices.description: Purges the enemy target, removing 1 beneficial Magic effect.

choices.name: Greater Purge
choices.description: Purges the enemy target, removing 2 beneficial Magic effects.

nodes.name: Nature's Fury
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Nature spells and abilities by 2%.

choices.name: Ascending Air
choices.description: Wind Rush Totem's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec and its movement speed effect lasts an additional 2 sec.

choices.name: Jet Stream
choices.description: Wind Rush Totem's movement speed bonus is increased by 10% and now removes snares.

nodes.name: Primordial Bond
nodes.description: Your Earth Elemental no longer taunts nearby enemies or generates threat and instead increases your maximum health by 15% while active.

nodes.name: Hex
nodes.description: Transforms the enemy into a frog for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

nodes.name: Spiritwalker's Grace
nodes.description: Calls upon the guidance of the spirits for 15 sec, permitting movement while casting Shaman spells. Castable while casting.

nodes.name: Totemic Projection
nodes.description: Relocates your active totems to the specified location.

nodes.name: Elemental Warding
nodes.description: Reduces all magic damage taken by 8%.

nodes.name: Totemic Focus
nodes.description:
Increases the radius of your totem effects by 15%.

Increases the duration of your Earthbind and Earthgrab Totems by 10 sec.

Increases the duration of your Healing Stream, Tremor, Poison Cleansing, and Wind Rush Totems by 3.0 sec.

choices.name: Graceful Spirit
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Spiritwalker's Grace by 30 sec and increases your movement speed by 20% while it is active.

choices.name: Spiritwalker's Aegis
choices.description: When you cast Spiritwalker's Grace, you become immune to Silence and Interrupt effects for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Mana Spring
nodes.description:
Your Lava Burst casts restore 22 mana to you and 4 allies nearest to you within 40 yards.

Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers.

choices.name: Tremor Totem
choices.description: Summons a totem at your feet that shakes the ground around it for 10 sec, removing Fear, Charm and Sleep effects from party and raid members within 30 yards.

choices.name: Poison Cleansing Totem
choices.description: Summons a totem at your feet that removes all Poison effects from a nearby party or raid member within 30 yards every 1.5 sec for 6 sec.

choices.name: Therazane's Resilience
choices.description: Earth Shield no longer loses charges and is 115% effective.

choices.name: Reactive Warding
choices.description:
When refreshing Earth Shield, your target is healed for 830 for each stack of Earth Shield they are missing.

Additionally, Earth Shield can consume charges 1.0 sec faster.

nodes.name: Voodoo Mastery
nodes.description:
Your Hex target is slowed by 70% during Hex and for 6 sec after it ends.

Reduces the cooldown of Hex by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Nature's Swiftness
nodes.description: Your next healing or damaging Nature spell is instant cast and costs no mana.

nodes.name: Totemic Surge
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of most totems by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Instinctive Imbuements
nodes.description:
Lightning Shield increases your Intellect by 3%.

Casting Lightning Shield now applies your weapon imbuements. Earth Shield is also applied if you have the Elemental Orbit talent.

choices.name: Earth Shock
choices.description: Instantly shocks the target with concussive force, causing 2,958 Nature damage.

choices.name: Elemental Blast
choices.description: Harnesses the raw power of the elements, dealing 764 Elemental damage and increasing your Critical Strike or Haste by 3% or Mastery by 6% for 10 sec.

choices.name: Earthquake
choices.description:
Causes the earth within 8 yards of your target to tremble and break, dealing 1,447 Nature damage over 6 sec and has a 5% chance to knock the enemy down. Multiple uses of Earthquake may overlap.

This spell is cast at your target.

choices.name: Earthquake
choices.description:
Causes the earth within 8 yards of the target location to tremble and break, dealing 1,471 Nature damage over 6 sec and has a 5% chance to knock the enemy down. Multiple uses of Earthquake may overlap.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

nodes.name: Elemental Fury
nodes.description: Your damaging critical strikes deal 250% damage instead of the usual 200%.

nodes.name: Echo of the Elements
nodes.description: Lava Burst has an additional charge.

nodes.name: Flash of Lightning
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning by 10%.

choices.name: Tectonic Collapse
choices.description: Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake deal 20% increased damage.

choices.name: Aftershock
choices.description: Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake have a 25% chance to refund all Maelstrom spent.

choices.name: Molten Wrath
choices.description: Lava Burst deals 15% additional damage.

choices.name: Master of the Elements
choices.description: Casting Lava Burst increases the damage or healing of your next Nature, Physical, or Frost spell by 15%.

nodes.name: Lightning Capacitor
nodes.description: While Lightning Shield is active, your Nature damage dealt is increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Stormkeeper
nodes.description: Charge yourself with lightning, causing your next 2 Lightning Bolts to deal 150% more damage, and also causes your next 2 Lightning Bolts or Chain Lightings to be instant cast and trigger an Elemental Overload on every target.

nodes.name: Flametongue Weapon
nodes.description: Imbue your weapon with the element of Fire for 1 hour, increasing the damage of your Fire spells by 5.0%.

nodes.name: Storm Frenzy
nodes.description: Reduces the cast time of Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning by 15%.

nodes.name: Swelling Maelstrom
nodes.description:
Increases your maximum Maelstrom by 50.

Increases Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake damage by 5%.

nodes.name: Primordial Fury
nodes.description: Elemental Fury increases critical strike damage by an additional 25%.

choices.name: Fury of the Storms
choices.description: Casting Stormkeeper summons a Greater Storm Elemental to hurl gusts of wind at your enemies for 10 sec.

choices.name: Herald of the Storms
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Stormkeeper by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Flames of the Cauldron
nodes.description:
Reduces the cooldown of Flame Shock and Voltaic Blaze by 1.5 sec.

Flame Shock deals damage 15% faster.

nodes.name: Amped Up
nodes.description: Increases your haste by 3%.

choices.name: Elemental Resonance
choices.description: All Elemental damage increased by 3%.

choices.name: Thunderstrike Ward
choices.description: Imbue your shield with the element of Lightning for 1 hour, giving Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning a chance to call down 2 Thunderstrikes on your target for 271 Nature damage.

nodes.name: Path of the Seer
nodes.description: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

nodes.name: Elemental Unity
nodes.description:
While a Fire Elemental is active, your Fire damage dealt is increased by 6%.

While a Storm Elemental is active, your Nature damage dealt is increased by 6%.

nodes.name: Searing Flames
nodes.description: Flame Shock damage has a chance to generate 2 Maelstrom.

nodes.name: Power of the Maelstrom
nodes.description: Casting Lava Burst has a 15% chance to cause your next Lightning Bolt or Chain Lightning cast to trigger Elemental Overload an additional time, stacking up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Earthshatter
nodes.description: Increases Earth Shock and Earthquake damage by 8% and the stat bonuses granted by Elemental Blast by 25%.

nodes.name: Storm Infusion
nodes.description:
Elemental Resonance
All elemental damage is increased by an additional 2%.

 Thunderstrike Ward
Increases the chance for Thunderstrikes to occur by 30% and increases Thunderstrike damage by 75%.

nodes.name: Echo Chamber
nodes.description: Increases the damage dealt by your Elemental Overloads by 25%.

nodes.name: Everlasting Elements
nodes.description: Increases the duration of your Elementals by 20%.

nodes.name: Earthen Rage
nodes.description: Your damaging spells incite the earth around you to come to your aid for 6 sec, repeatedly dealing 162 Nature damage to your most recently attacked target.

nodes.name: Lava Flows
nodes.description:
Lava Burst damage increased by 5%.

Lava Burst and Lava Burst Overload generate 1 additional Maelstrom.

nodes.name: Fusion of Elements
nodes.description: Consuming Power of the Maelstrom additionally fires an Elemental Blast at your target at 40% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Eye of the Storm
nodes.description:
Reduces the Maelstrom cost of Earth Shock and Earthquake by 5.

Reduces the Maelstrom cost of Elemental Blast by 10.

nodes.name: Ascendance
nodes.description:
Transform into a Flame Ascendant for 15 sec, instantly casting a Flame Shock and a 100% effectiveness Lava Burst at up to 6 nearby enemies.

While ascended, Elemental Overload damage is increased by 75% and spells affected by your Mastery: Elemental Overload cause 1 additional Elemental Overload.

nodes.name: Inferno Arc
nodes.description: Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake deal 10% increased damage to targets affected by Flame Shock.

nodes.name: Flames of the Firelord
nodes.description: Flame Shock damage increased by 100%.

nodes.name: Lightning Rod
nodes.description:
Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning make your target a Lightning Rod for 8 sec.
 
Lightning Rods take 10% of all damage you deal with Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning.

nodes.name: Mountains Will Fall
nodes.description:
Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake can trigger your Mastery: Elemental Overload at 50% effectiveness.

Overloaded Earthquakes do not knock enemies down.

nodes.name: Call of Fire
nodes.description:
Ascendance summons a Greater Fire Elemental to rain destruction on your enemies for 20 sec. 

While the Fire Elemental is active, Flame Shock deals damage 33% faster, and newly applied Flame Shocks last 100% longer.

nodes.name: Voltaic Blaze
nodes.description:
Instantly shocks the target and 5 enemies within 10 yds with blazing thunder, applying Flame Shock and dealing 1,510 Nature damage. Always critically strikes.

Generates 1 stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

nodes.name: Charged Conduit
nodes.description: Increases the duration of Lightning Rod by 4 sec and its damage bonus by 25%.

choices.name: First Ascendant
choices.description: The cooldown of Ascendance is reduced by 60 sec.

choices.name: Preeminence
choices.description: Your haste is increased by 25% during Ascendance and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Primal Elementalist
nodes.description: Your Earth, Fire, and Storm Elementals are drawn from primal elementals 80% more powerful than regular elementals, with additional abilities, and you gain direct control over your Primal Fire Elemental.

nodes.name: Crackling Fury
nodes.description: Voltaic Blaze's cooldown is reduced by 3 sec and its instant damage is increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Purging Flames
nodes.description:
Voltaic Blaze unleashes volcanic rage, causing your next Lava Burst to also fire at 5 additional targets with your Flame Shock at 80% effectiveness with reduced Maelstrom generation.

Lava Burst damage increased by 10%.

ranks.description: Spell critical strike chance increased by 5%. Elemental Fury increases spell critical strike damage by an additional 25%.
Elemental Overloads have a 25% chance to cause an additional Elemental Overload. This effect cannot chain.

choices.name: Lightning Conduit
choices.description:
You have a chance to get struck by lightning, increasing your movement speed by 50% for 5 sec. The effectiveness is increased to 100% in outdoor areas.

You call down a Thunderstorm when you Reincarnate.

choices.name: Electroshock
choices.description: Tempest increases your movement speed by 20% for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Awakening Storms
nodes.description: Stormstrike has a small chance to upgrade your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

nodes.name: Conductive Energy
nodes.description:
Gain the effects of the Lightning Rod talent:

 Lightning Rod
Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning make your target a Lightning Rod for 8 sec.
 
Lightning Rods take 10% of all damage you deal with Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning.

nodes.name: Voltaic Surge
nodes.description: Crash Lightning and Chain Lightning damage increased by 15%.

choices.name: Storm Swell
choices.description: Tempest grants 7% Mastery for 6 sec.

choices.name: Supercharge
choices.description: Lightning Bolt, Tempest, and Chain Lightning have a 35% chance to refund 2 Maelstrom Weapon stacks.

choices.name: Nature's Protection
choices.description: Lightning Shield reduces the damage you take by 3%.

choices.name: Surging Currents
choices.description: Casting Tempest grants Surging Currents, increasing the effectiveness of your next Chain Heal or Healing Surge by 16%, up to 80%.

nodes.name: Arc Discharge
nodes.description:
Tempest causes your next Chain Lightning to be instant cast, deal 40% increased damage, and cast an additional time.

Can accumulate up to 2 charges.

nodes.name: Unlimited Power
nodes.description:
Spending Maelstrom Weapon stacks grants you 1% haste for 15 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: Rolling Thunder
nodes.description:
Doom Winds summons a Nature Feral Spirit for 12 sec.

Feral Spirit
An Elemental Spirit infused with Nature magic, granting the summoner with 5% increased Nature damage and 5% Physical damage for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Tempest
nodes.description: Each Maelstrom Weapon spent has a 2.00% chance to upgrade your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

nodes.name: Stormcaller
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Nature damage spells by 5% and the critical strike damage of your Nature spells by 5%.

nodes.name: Descending Skies
nodes.description: Casting Ascendance upgrades your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

nodes.name: Natural Gift
nodes.description: Nature damage is increased by 2%

nodes.name: Stormwell
nodes.description: Storm Elemental lasts 2 sec longer, and Stormkeeper generates 10 Maelstrom.

choices.name: Natural Harmony
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Nature's Guardian by 15 sec and causes it to heal for an additional 10% of your maximum health.

choices.name: Earthen Communion
choices.description: Earth Shield has an additional 3 charges and heals you for 25% more.

nodes.name: Primordial Capacity
nodes.description:
Increases your maximum mana by 10%.

Tidal Waves can now stack up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Spiritwalker's Momentum
nodes.description: Using spells with a cast time increases the duration of Spiritwalker's Grace and Spiritwalker's Aegis by 1 sec, up to a maximum of 4 sec.

choices.name: Latent Wisdom
choices.description: Your Ancestors' spells are 25% more powerful.

choices.name: Ancient Fellowship
choices.description: Ancestors have a 20% chance to call another Ancestor for 8 sec when they depart.

nodes.name: Elemental Reverb
nodes.description: Lava Burst gains an additional charge and deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Final Calling
nodes.description:
When an Ancestor departs, they cast Hydrobubble on a nearby injured ally.

 Hydrobubble
Surrounds your target in a protective water bubble for 15 sec.

The shield absorbs the next 1,795 incoming damage, but the absorb amount decays fully over its duration.

nodes.name: Maelstrom Supremacy
nodes.description: Increases the healing done by Healing Wave, Downpour, and Chain Heal by 25%.

choices.name: Heed My Call
choices.description: Ancestors last an additional 4 sec.

choices.name: Routine Communication
choices.description: Riptide has a 15% chance to call an Ancestor to your side for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Offering from Beyond
nodes.description: When an Ancestor is called, they reduce the cooldown of Riptide by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Call of the Ancestors
nodes.description:
Unleash Life calls an Ancestor to your side for 12 sec.

Whenever you cast a healing or damaging spell, the Ancestor will cast a similar spell.

nodes.name: Ancestral Swiftness
nodes.description:
Your next healing or damaging spell is instant, costs no mana, and deals 10% increased damage and healing.

If you know Nature's Swiftness, it is replaced by Ancestral Swiftness and causes Ancestral Swiftness to call an Ancestor to your side for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Mystic Knowledge
nodes.description: Increases the chance for Lava Surge to occur by 20%.

nodes.name: Windspeaker
nodes.description: The cast times of Healing Surge, Chain Heal and Lava Burst are reduced by 10%.

nodes.name: Ancestral Influence
nodes.description: Your Intellect is increased by 1.0% for each Ancestor active.

enhancement.description: A totemic warrior who strikes foes with weapons imbued with elemental power. Preferred Weapons: Dual Axes, Maces, Fist Weapons

left.name: Totemic
left.description: Totemic shamans excel at unlocking the full power of their totems, strengthening their totems and gaining access to new ones. They also hone their imbuement skills to maintain their threat up close.

right.name: Stormbringer
right.description: Stormbringers harness the power of the storm, enhancing their dominion over lightning and shaping it to their will. Summon a fierce Tempest to unleash chaos upon your foes awakening the storm, creating devastation in your path.

nodes.name: Chain Heal
nodes.description: Heals the friendly target for 892, then jumps up to 20 yards to heal the 3 most injured nearby allies. Healing is reduced by 30% with each jump.

nodes.name: Lava Lash
nodes.description:
Charges your off-hand weapon with lava and burns your target, dealing 4 Fire damage.

Damage is increased by 100% if your offhand weapon is imbued with Flametongue Weapon.

nodes.name: Chain Lightning
nodes.description: Hurls a lightning bolt at the enemy, dealing 275 Nature damage and then jumping to additional nearby enemies. Affects 3 total targets

choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Spiritwalker's Grace by 30 sec and increases your movement speed by 20% while it is active.

choices.name: Spiritwalker's Aegis
choices.description: When you cast Spiritwalker's Grace, you become immune to Silence and Interrupt effects for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Mana Spring
nodes.description:
Your Lava Burst casts restore 22 mana to you and 4 allies nearest to you within 40 yards.

Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers.

choices.name: Tremor Totem
choices.description: Summons a totem at your feet that shakes the ground around it for 10 sec, removing Fear, Charm and Sleep effects from party and raid members within 30 yards.

choices.name: Poison Cleansing Totem
choices.description: Summons a totem at your feet that removes all Poison effects from a nearby party or raid member within 30 yards every 1.5 sec for 6 sec.

choices.name: Therazane's Resilience
choices.description: Earth Shield no longer loses charges and is 115% effective.

choices.name: Reactive Warding
choices.description:
When refreshing Earth Shield, your target is healed for 830 for each stack of Earth Shield they are missing.

Additionally, Earth Shield can consume charges 1.0 sec faster.

nodes.name: Voodoo Mastery
nodes.description:
Your Hex target is slowed by 70% during Hex and for 6 sec after it ends.

Reduces the cooldown of Hex by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Nature's Swiftness
nodes.description: Your next healing or damaging Nature spell is instant cast and costs no mana.

nodes.name: Totemic Surge
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of most totems by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Instinctive Imbuements
nodes.description:
Lightning Shield increases your Intellect by 3%.

Casting Lightning Shield now applies your weapon imbuements. Earth Shield is also applied if you have the Elemental Orbit talent.

nodes.name: Maelstrom Weapon
nodes.description:
When you deal damage with a melee weapon, you have a chance to generate Maelstrom Weapon, stacking up to 5 times. 

Each stack of Maelstrom Weapon reduces the cast time of your next Lightning Bolt or Chain Lightning by 20% and increases its damage by 20%.

nodes.name: Windfury Weapon
nodes.description: Imbue your main-hand weapon with the element of Wind for 1 hour. Each main-hand attack has a 15% chance to trigger two extra attacks, dealing 9 Physical damage each.

nodes.name: Flametongue Weapon
nodes.description: Imbue your weapon with the element of Fire for 1 hour, increasing the damage of your Fire spells by 5.0%.

nodes.name: Forceful Winds
nodes.description: Windfury has a 10% additional chance to trigger and its damage is increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Crash Lightning
nodes.description:
Electrocutes all enemies in front of you, dealing 65 Nature damage. 

Enhances your weapons for 12 sec, causing Stormstrike and Lava Lash to discharge 34 Nature damage split between up to 5 enemies in front of you.

nodes.name: Molten Assault
nodes.description: Lava Lash cooldown reduced by 6.0 sec, and if Lava Lash is used against a target affected by your Flame Shock, Flame Shock will be spread to up to 5 nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Unruly Winds
nodes.description: Windfury Weapon has a 100% chance to trigger a third attack.

nodes.name: Overflowing Maelstrom
nodes.description:
Maelstrom Weapon can now stack 5 additional times.

Each Maelstrom Weapon stacks consumed grants Overflowing Maelstrom, reducing the cast time of your next Healing Surge or Chain Heal by 10%, and increasing their healing by 10% up to 10 times. This effect can be accumulated up to 20 times.

nodes.name: Ashen Catalyst
nodes.description: When Lava Lash strikes a target affected by your Flame Shock, its cooldown is reduced by 2.0 sec.

nodes.name: Stormblast
nodes.description:
Stormstrike has an additional charge.

Stormsurge now also causes your next Stormstrike to deal 25% additional damage as Nature damage, stacking up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Overcharge
nodes.description: The critical strike damage of your Nature abilities are increased by 40% of your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Raging Maelstrom
nodes.description: Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning can consume up to 10 Maelstrom Weapon stacks.

nodes.name: Flurry
nodes.description: Increases your attack speed by 15% for your next 3 melee swings after dealing a critical strike with a spell or ability.

nodes.name: Hot Hand
nodes.description:
Melee auto-attacks with Flametongue Weapon active have a 5% chance to reduce the cooldown of Lava Lash by 25% and increase the damage of Lava Lash by 20% for 8 sec.

May not occur during an active Hot Hand.

nodes.name: Storm's Wrath
nodes.description: Increase the chance for Mastery: Enhanced Elements to trigger Windfury and Stormsurge by 150%.

nodes.name: Elemental Tempo
nodes.description:
Elemental damage increased by 10%. 

Each stack of Maelstrom Weapon consumed reduces the cooldown of Stormstrike by 0.3 sec and Lava Lash by 0.3 sec.

nodes.name: Voltaic Blaze
nodes.description:
Instantly shocks the target and 5 enemies within 10 yds with blazing thunder, applying Flame Shock and dealing 1,512 Nature damage. Always critically strikes.

Generates 1 stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

nodes.name: Chaining Storms
nodes.description: Chain Lightning now jumps to 2 additional targets and deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Converging Storms
nodes.description: Each target hit by Crash Lightning increases the damage of your next Stormstrike by 25%, up to a maximum of 6 stacks.

nodes.name: Stormflurry
nodes.description: Stormstrike has a 20% chance to strike the target an additional time for 40% of normal damage. This effect can chain off of itself.

nodes.name: Stormbind
nodes.description: Critical strikes of your Nature abilities reduce the target's movement speed by 60% for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Elemental Weapons
nodes.description: Each active weapon imbue increases all Fire, Frost, and Nature damage dealt by 5.0%.

nodes.name: Fire Nova
nodes.description:
Voltaic Blaze generates 2 additional Maelstrom Weapon and has a 30% chance to cause a Fire Nova.

Fire Nova
Erupt a burst of fiery damage from all targets affected by your Flame Shock, dealing 35 Volcanic damage to up to 6 targets within 8 yds of your Flame Shock targets.

nodes.name: Lashing Flames
nodes.description: Lava Lash and Sundering increases the damage of Flame Shock on its target by 100% for 20 sec.

nodes.name: Ride the Lightning
nodes.description: Stormstrike and Lava Lash unleash a Chain Lightning at 100% effectiveness that deals 20% reduced damage with each jump.

nodes.name: Doom Winds
nodes.description:
Unleash a devastating storm around yourself, dealing 42 Stormstrike damage every 1 sec to nearby enemies for 8 sec.

Increases your chance to activate Windfury Weapon by 100%, and the damage of Windfury Weapon by 20%.

nodes.name: Sundering
nodes.description: Shatters a line of earth in front of you with your main hand weapon, causing 89 Flamestrike damage to any enemy hit.

nodes.name: Lightning Strikes
nodes.description: Consuming 10 stacks of Maelstrom Weapon increases the damage of your next Stormstrike or Lava Lash by 25% and causes them to generate a stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

nodes.name: Elemental Assault
nodes.description: Stormstrike damage is increased by 20%, and Stormstrike and Lava Lash have a 100% chance to generate 1 stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

nodes.name: Static Accumulation
nodes.description: During Doom Winds or Ascendance, you generate 1 Maelstrom Weapon stack every 1 sec.

nodes.name: Feral Spirit
nodes.description:
Casting Sundering summons 1 Fire Feral Spirit and Doom Winds summons 1 Nature Feral Spirit by your side for 8 sec.

Feral Spirit
An Elemental Spirit Wolf infused with Fire or Nature magic, granting the summoner with 5% increased Fire or Nature damage and 5% Physical damage for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Surging Elements
nodes.description: Casting Sundering grants you 15% Haste for 12 sec, and generates 5 stacks of Maelstrom Weapon.

nodes.name: Thunder Capacitor
nodes.description: Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning deal 20% increased damage and have a 20% chance to refund the Maelstrom Weapon spent.

choices.name: Deeply Rooted Elements
choices.description:
Each stack of Maelstrom Weapon consumed has a 0.6% chance to activate Ascendance for 6.0 sec.

 Ascendance
Transform into an Air Ascendant for 15 sec and unleash Doom Winds, reducing the cooldown and cost of Stormstrike by 60%, and transforming your auto attack and Stormstrike into Wind attacks which bypass armor and have a 30 yd range.

choices.name: Ascendance
choices.description:
Transform into an Air Ascendant for 15 sec and unleash Doom Winds, reducing the cooldown and cost of Stormstrike by 60%, and transforming your auto attack and Stormstrike into Wind attacks which bypass armor and have a 30 yd range.

Maelstrom Weapon spenders have a 0.5% chance to unleash Doom Winds per Maelstrom Weapon spent while Ascendance is not active.

nodes.name: Thorim's Invocation
nodes.description:
Doom Winds and Deeply Rooted Elements last 2 sec longer, and the cooldown of Ascendance is reduced by 60 sec.

During Doom Winds or Ascendance, Stormstrike and Crash Lightning consume up to 10 Maelstrom Weapon to discharge a Lightning Bolt or Chain Lightning at 100% effectiveness at your enemy, whichever you most recently used.

nodes.name: Primordial Storm
nodes.description:
Sundering transforms into a single use Primordial Storm for 15 sec after it is cast.

Primordial Storm
Devastate nearby enemies with a Primordial Storm dealing 42 Flamestrike, 42 Froststrike, 41 Stormstrike damage, and unleashing a Lightning Bolt or a Chain Lightning at 150% effectiveness. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Consumes Maelstrom Weapon for increased damage.

ranks.description: Each Maelstrom Weapon spent has a 2% chance to cause your next Crash Lightning to ignore its cooldown. The weapon enhancement effect of Crash Lightning may now overlap.

Maelstrom Weapon spending abilities deal 8% increased damage. 

Weapon Imbuements deal 10% increased damage.
Crash Lightning electrocutes the area struck, dealing 50% of its damage 2 additional times over 2 sec, and its weapon enhancement effect now increases auto-attack speed by 15%.

choices.name: Oversized Totems
choices.description: Increases the size and radius of your totems by 15%, and the health of your totems by 30%.

choices.name: Swift Recall
choices.description:
Successfully removing a harmful effect with Tremor Totem or Poison Cleansing Totem, or controlling an enemy with Capacitor Totem or Earthgrab Totem reduces the cooldown of the totem used by 5 sec.

Cannot occur more than once every 20 sec per totem.

choices.name: Pulse Capacitor
choices.description: Increases the healing done by Surging Totem by 25%.

choices.name: Supportive Imbuements
choices.description:
Learn a new weapon imbue, Tidecaller's Guard.

 Tidecaller's Guard
Imbue your shield with the element of Water for 1 hour. Your healing done is increased by 2.0% and the duration of your Healing Stream Totem is increased by 3.0 sec.

nodes.name: Imbuement Mastery
nodes.description: Increases the duration of your Earthliving effect by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Splitstream
nodes.description:
Your Healing Stream Totems heals an additional ally at 30% effectiveness.

Healing Tide Totem healing increased by 25%.

choices.name: Amplification Core
choices.description: While Surging Totem is active, your damage and healing done is increased by 3%.

choices.name: Oversurge
choices.description: Surging Totem deals 50% more damage while Ascendance or Healing Tide Totem is active.

nodes.name: Surging Totem
nodes.description: Summons a totem at the target location that creates a Tremor immediately and every 5.4 sec for 43 Flamestrike damage. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. Lasts 25 sec.

nodes.name: Whirling Elements
nodes.description:
Elemental motes orbit around your Surging Totem. Your abilities consume the motes for enhanced effects. 

Water: Your next Healing Wave also heals an ally inside of your Healing Rain at 50% effectiveness.

Air: The cast time of your next healing spell is reduced by 40%.

Earth: Your next Chain Heal applies Earthliving at 150% effectiveness to all targets hit.

choices.name: Totemic Coordination
choices.description: Chain Heals from Lively Totem and Totemic Rebound are 25% more effective.

choices.name: Earthsurge
choices.description: Allies affected by your Earthliving effect receive 15% increased healing from you.

nodes.name: Lively Totems
nodes.description: When you summon a Healing Tide Totem, Healing Stream Totem, or Spirit Link Totem you cast a free instant Chain Heal at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Totemic Rebound
nodes.description: Chain Heal now jumps to a nearby totem within 20 yards once it reaches its last target, causing the totem to cast Chain Heal on an injured ally within 30 yards for 844. Jumps to 2 nearby targets within 20 yards.

nodes.name: Wind Barrier
nodes.description: If you have a totem active, your totem grants you a shield absorbing 1,833 damage for 30 sec every 30 sec.

nodes.name: Primal Catalyst
nodes.description: Healing Stream Totem and Healing Tide Totem healing has a 8% chance to apply Earthliving to allies it heals.

nodes.name: Elemental Attunement
nodes.description: Mastery increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Totemic Momentum
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Healing Stream Totem by 3 sec.

choices.name: Lightning Conduit
choices.description:
You have a chance to get struck by lightning, increasing your movement speed by 50% for 5 sec. The effectiveness is increased to 100% in outdoor areas.

You call down a Thunderstorm when you Reincarnate.

choices.name: Electroshock
choices.description: Tempest increases your movement speed by 20% for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Awakening Storms
nodes.description: Stormstrike has a small chance to upgrade your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

nodes.name: Conductive Energy
nodes.description:
Gain the effects of the Lightning Rod talent:

 Lightning Rod
Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning make your target a Lightning Rod for 8 sec.
 
Lightning Rods take 10% of all damage you deal with Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning.

nodes.name: Voltaic Surge
nodes.description: Crash Lightning and Chain Lightning damage increased by 15%.

choices.name: Storm Swell
choices.description: Tempest grants 7% Mastery for 6 sec.

choices.name: Supercharge
choices.description: Lightning Bolt, Tempest, and Chain Lightning have a 35% chance to refund 2 Maelstrom Weapon stacks.

choices.name: Nature's Protection
choices.description: Lightning Shield reduces the damage you take by 3%.

choices.name: Surging Currents
choices.description: Casting Tempest grants Surging Currents, increasing the effectiveness of your next Chain Heal or Healing Surge by 16%, up to 80%.

nodes.name: Arc Discharge
nodes.description:
Tempest causes your next Chain Lightning to be instant cast, deal 40% increased damage, and cast an additional time.

Can accumulate up to 2 charges.

nodes.name: Unlimited Power
nodes.description:
Spending Maelstrom Weapon stacks grants you 1% haste for 15 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

nodes.name: Rolling Thunder
nodes.description:
Doom Winds summons a Nature Feral Spirit for 12 sec.

Feral Spirit
An Elemental Spirit infused with Nature magic, granting the summoner with 5% increased Nature damage and 5% Physical damage for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Tempest
nodes.description: Each Maelstrom Weapon spent has a 2.00% chance to upgrade your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

nodes.name: Stormcaller
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Nature damage spells by 5% and the critical strike damage of your Nature spells by 5%.

nodes.name: Descending Skies
nodes.description: Casting Ascendance upgrades your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

nodes.name: Natural Gift
nodes.description: Nature damage is increased by 2%

nodes.name: Stormwell
nodes.description: Storm Elemental lasts 2 sec longer, and Stormkeeper generates 10 Maelstrom.

restoration.description: A healer who calls upon ancestral spirits and the cleansing power of water to mend allies' wounds. Preferred Weapon: Mace, Dagger, and Shield

left.name: Totemic
left.description: Totemic shamans excel at unlocking the full power of their totems, strengthening their totems and gaining access to new ones. They also hone their imbuement skills to maintain their threat up close.

right.name: Farseer
right.description: Harness your spiritual magic, improving your spell casting capabilities and empowering you to call upon the spirits of your ancestors to aid you and your allies in combat.

nodes.name: Chain Heal
nodes.description: Heals the friendly target for 872, then jumps up to 20 yards to heal the 3 most injured nearby allies. Healing is reduced by 30% with each jump.

nodes.name: Lava Burst
nodes.description: Hurls molten lava at the target, dealing 532 Fire damage. Lava Burst will always critically strike if the target is affected by Flame Shock and its damage is increased by your critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Chain Lightning
nodes.description: Hurls a lightning bolt at the enemy, dealing 273 Nature damage and then jumping to additional nearby enemies. Affects 3 total targets

nodes.name: Earth Shield
nodes.description:
Protects the target with an earthen shield, increasing your healing on them by 20% and healing them for 336 when they take damage. This heal can only occur once every 3 sec. Maximum 9 charges.

Earth Shield can only be placed on one target at a time. Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman.

nodes.name: Ancestral Wolf Affinity
nodes.description: Cleanse Spirit, Wind Shear, Purge, and totem casts no longer cancel Ghost Wolf.

nodes.name: Fire and Ice
nodes.description: Increases all Fire and Frost damage you deal by 3%.

choices.name: Spirit Wolf
choices.description: While transformed into a Ghost Wolf, you gain 5% increased movement speed and 5% damage reduction every 1 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

choices.name: Thunderous Paws
choices.description: Ghost Wolf removes snares and increases your movement speed by an additional 25% for the first 3 sec. May only occur once every 20 sec.

nodes.name: Frost Shock
nodes.description: Chills the target with frost, causing 278 Frost damage and reducing the target's movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Elemental Orbit
nodes.description:
Increases the number of Elemental Shields you can have active on yourself by 1.

You can have Earth Shield on yourself and one ally at the same time.

choices.name: Spirit Walk
choices.description: Removes all movement impairing effects and increases your movement speed by 60% for 8 sec.

choices.name: Gust of Wind
choices.description: A gust of wind hurls you forward.

nodes.name: Astral Shift
nodes.description: Shift partially into the elemental planes, taking 40% less damage for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Nature's Guardian
nodes.description: When your health is brought below 35%, you instantly heal for 40% of your maximum health. Cannot occur more than once every 45 sec.

choices.name: Encasing Cold
choices.description: Increases the cooldown of Frost Shock by 15 sec, but Frost Shock now freezes targets in place for 4 sec.

choices.name: Arctic Snowstorm
choices.description: Enemies within 10 yds of your Frost Shock are snared by 30%.

nodes.name: Healing Stream Totem
nodes.description:
Summons a totem at your feet for 15 sec that heals an injured party or raid member within 40 yards for 252 every 1.8 sec.

If you already know Healing Stream Totem, instead gain 1 additional charge of Healing Stream Totem.

nodes.name: Winds of Al'Akir
nodes.description: Increases your movement speed by 3% and the movement speed bonus of Ghost Wolf by an additional 5%.

choices.name: Planes Traveler
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Astral Shift by 30 sec.

choices.name: Astral Bulwark
choices.description: Astral Shift reduces damage taken by an additional 20%.

nodes.name: Brimming with Life
nodes.description:
Stamina increased by 8%.

While you are at full health, Reincarnation cools down 50% faster.

nodes.name: Wind Shear
nodes.description: Disrupts the target's concentration with a burst of wind, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec.

nodes.name: Elemental Resistance
nodes.description: Healing from Healing Stream Totem reduces Fire, Frost, and Nature damage taken by 6% for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Earthgrab Totem
nodes.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 20 sec. The totem pulses every 2 sec, rooting all enemies within 8 yards for 8 sec. Enemies previously rooted by the totem instead suffer 50% movement speed reduction.

nodes.name: Capacitor Totem
nodes.description: Summons a totem at the target location that gathers electrical energy from the surrounding air and explodes after 2 sec, stunning all enemies within 8 yards for 3 sec.

nodes.name: Spiritual Awakening
nodes.description: Mastery increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Enhanced Imbues
nodes.description: The effects of your weapon and shield imbues are increased by 30%.

nodes.name: Windveil
nodes.description: Interrupting a spell with Wind Shear reduces all spell damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

nodes.name: Refreshing Waters
nodes.description: Your Healing Surge is 25% more effective on yourself.

nodes.name: Improved Purify Spirit
nodes.description: Purify Spirit additionally removes all Curse effects.

nodes.name: Static Charge
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Capacitor Totem by 10 sec.

nodes.name: Wind Rush Totem
nodes.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 15 sec, continually granting all allies who pass within 10 yards 40% increased movement speed for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Earth Elemental
nodes.description: Calls forth a Greater Earth Elemental to protect you and your allies, generating high threat and taunting enemies periodically for 30 sec.

choices.name: Purge
choices.description: Purges the enemy target, removing 1 beneficial Magic effect.

choices.name: Greater Purge
choices.description: Purges the enemy target, removing 2 beneficial Magic effects.

nodes.name: Nature's Fury
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Nature spells and abilities by 2%.

choices.name: Ascending Air
choices.description: Wind Rush Totem's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec and its movement speed effect lasts an additional 2 sec.

choices.name: Jet Stream
choices.description: Wind Rush Totem's movement speed bonus is increased by 10% and now removes snares.

nodes.name: Primordial Bond
nodes.description: Your Earth Elemental no longer taunts nearby enemies or generates threat and instead increases your maximum health by 15% while active.

nodes.name: Hex
nodes.description: Transforms the enemy into a frog for 1 min. While hexed, the victim is incapacitated, and cannot attack or cast spells. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1. Only works on Humanoids and Beasts.

nodes.name: Spiritwalker's Grace
nodes.description: Calls upon the guidance of the spirits for 15 sec, permitting movement while casting Shaman spells. Castable while casting.

nodes.name: Totemic Projection
nodes.description: Relocates your active totems to the specified location.

nodes.name: Elemental Warding
nodes.description: Reduces all magic damage taken by 8%.

nodes.name: Totemic Focus
nodes.description:
Increases the radius of your totem effects by 15%.

Increases the duration of your Earthbind and Earthgrab Totems by 10 sec.

Increases the duration of your Healing Stream, Tremor, Poison Cleansing, and Wind Rush Totems by 3.0 sec.

choices.name: Graceful Spirit
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Spiritwalker's Grace by 30 sec and increases your movement speed by 20% while it is active.

choices.name: Spiritwalker's Aegis
choices.description: When you cast Spiritwalker's Grace, you become immune to Silence and Interrupt effects for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Mana Spring
nodes.description:
Your Lava Burst casts restore 22 mana to you and 4 allies nearest to you within 40 yards.

Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers.

choices.name: Tremor Totem
choices.description: Summons a totem at your feet that shakes the ground around it for 10 sec, removing Fear, Charm and Sleep effects from party and raid members within 30 yards.

choices.name: Poison Cleansing Totem
choices.description: Summons a totem at your feet that removes all Poison effects from a nearby party or raid member within 30 yards every 1.5 sec for 6 sec.

choices.name: Therazane's Resilience
choices.description: Earth Shield no longer loses charges and is 115% effective.

choices.name: Reactive Warding
choices.description:
When refreshing Earth Shield, your target is healed for 830 for each stack of Earth Shield they are missing.

Additionally, Earth Shield can consume charges 1.0 sec faster.

nodes.name: Voodoo Mastery
nodes.description:
Your Hex target is slowed by 70% during Hex and for 6 sec after it ends.

Reduces the cooldown of Hex by 15 sec.

nodes.name: Nature's Swiftness
nodes.description: Your next healing or damaging Nature spell is instant cast and costs no mana.

nodes.name: Totemic Surge
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of most totems by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Instinctive Imbuements
nodes.description:
Lightning Shield increases your Intellect by 3%.

Casting Lightning Shield now applies your weapon imbuements. Earth Shield is also applied if you have the Elemental Orbit talent.

nodes.name: Riptide
nodes.description: Restorative waters wash over a friendly target, healing them for 1,803 and an additional 1,018 over 18 sec.

nodes.name: Healing Rain
nodes.description: Blanket the target area in healing rains, restoring 2,244 health to up to 5 allies over 18 sec.

nodes.name: Healing Stream Totem
nodes.description:
Summons a totem at your feet for 15 sec that heals an injured party or raid member within 40 yards for 259 every 1.8 sec.

If you already know Healing Stream Totem, instead gain 1 additional charge of Healing Stream Totem.

nodes.name: Soothing Rain
nodes.description: Increases the healing done by Healing Rain by 10% and reduces its cast time by 0.5 sec.

nodes.name: Acid Rain
nodes.description: Deal 253 Nature damage every 1 sec to up to 5 enemies inside of your Healing Rain.

choices.name: Ascendance
choices.description:
Immediately heals for 4,803 split between allies within 20 yds and transforms into a Water Ascendant for 15 sec.

While ascended, Chain Heal jumps to 3 additional allies with 10% healing reduced for all jumps, Healing Wave always critical heals and heals 1 additional ally at 50% effectiveness, and the mana cost of Chain Heal and Healing Wave is reduced by 25%.

choices.name: Healing Tide Totem
choices.description:
Summons a totem at your feet for 10 sec, which pulses every 1.8 sec, healing all party or raid members within 40 yards for 1,974.

Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Water Totem Mastery
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Healing Stream Totem by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Overflowing Shores
nodes.description: Healing Rain instantly restores 287 health to 5 allies within its area, and its radius is increased by 2 yards.

nodes.name: Ancestral Vigor
nodes.description: Targets you heal with Healing Wave, Chain Heal, or Riptide's initial heal gain 5% increased health for 10 sec.

choices.name: First Ascendant
choices.description: The cooldown of Ascendance is reduced by 60 sec.

choices.name: Preeminence
choices.description: Your haste is increased by 25% during Ascendance and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Resurgence
nodes.description: Your direct heal criticals refund a percentage of your maximum mana: 0.80% from Healing Wave, 0.48% from Riptide, and 0.20% from Chain Heal.

nodes.name: Living Stream
nodes.description: Healing Stream Totem heals for 100% more, decaying over its duration.

nodes.name: Current Control
nodes.description: Reduces the mana cost of Healing Wave by 15%.

nodes.name: White Water
nodes.description: Your critical heals have 215% effectiveness instead of the usual 200%.

nodes.name: Calm Waters
nodes.description: Reduces the mana cost of Chain Heal by 15%.

nodes.name: Quickstream
nodes.description: Healing Stream Totem heals 15% more often.

nodes.name: Rip Current
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Riptide by 1.0 sec.

nodes.name: Crashing Waves
nodes.description: Healing Wave's critical strike chance is increased by 12%.

nodes.name: Unleash Life
nodes.description:
Unleash elemental forces of Life, healing a friendly target for 2,274.

Increases the healing of your next Riptide, Chain Heal, or Healing Wave by 25% and reduces its cast time by 30%.

nodes.name: Torrent
nodes.description: Riptide's initial heal is increased 20% and has a 10% increased critical strike chance.

nodes.name: Earthliving Weapon
nodes.description: Imbue your weapon with the element of Earth for 1 hour. Your Riptide, Healing Wave, and Chain Heal healing has a 20% chance to trigger Earthliving on the target, healing for 591 over 6 sec.

nodes.name: Earthweaver
nodes.description: Increases Earth Shield healing by 40%.

nodes.name: Deluge
nodes.description: Healing Wave and Chain Heal heal for an additional 15% on targets affected by your Healing Rain or Riptide.

nodes.name: Earthen Accord
nodes.description: Unleash Life heals for 30% more and its bonus healing effect is increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Tidal Waves
nodes.description:
Casting Riptide grants 1 stack of Tidal Waves. Tidal Waves reduces the cast time of your next Healing Wave or Chain Heal by 20%.

Can accumulate up to 2 stacks.

nodes.name: Improved Earthliving Weapon
nodes.description:
Earthliving receives 150% additional benefit from Mastery: Deep Healing.

Healing Wave always triggers Earthliving on its target.

choices.name: Ancestral Reach
choices.description: Chain Heal bounces an additional time and its healing is increased by 8%.

choices.name: Flow of the Tides
choices.description: Chain Heal bounces an additional time and casting Chain Heal on a target affected by Riptide consumes Riptide, increasing the healing of your Chain Heal by 30%.

nodes.name: Downpour
nodes.description:
Casting Healing Rain grants a use of Downpour for 16 sec.

 Downpour
A burst of water at your Healing Rain's location heals up to 5 injured allies within 12 yards for 1,219.

nodes.name: Echo of the Elements
nodes.description: Lava Burst has an additional charge.

nodes.name: Spirit Link Totem
nodes.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 6 sec, which reduces damage taken by all party and raid members within 10 yards by 10%. Immediately and every 1 sec, the health of all affected players is redistributed evenly.

nodes.name: Earthen Harmony
nodes.description: Earth Shield reduces damage taken by 3% and its healing is increased by up to 150% as its target's health decreases. Maximum benefit is reached below 50% health.

nodes.name: Water Expulsion
nodes.description: Increases Downpour healing by 20%.

nodes.name: Ancestral Awakening
nodes.description: When you heal with your Healing Wave or Riptide you have a 30% chance to summon an Ancestral spirit to aid you, instantly healing an injured friendly party or raid target within 40 yards for 25% of the amount healed. Critical strikes increase this chance to 60%.

nodes.name: Tidewaters
nodes.description: When you cast Healing Rain, each ally with your Riptide on them is healed for 1,005.

nodes.name: Undercurrent
nodes.description: For each Riptide active on an ally, your heals are 0.5% more effective.

nodes.name: Spouting Spirits
nodes.description: Spirit Link Totem reduces damage taken by an additional 5%, and it restores 4,357 health to all nearby allies 1 second after it is dropped. Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Wavespeaker's Blessing
nodes.description: Increases Riptide's duration by 3.0 sec and its healing over time by 10%.

nodes.name: Double Dip
nodes.description: Healing Rain grants an additional use of Downpour.

nodes.name: Primal Tide Core
nodes.description: Every 4 casts of Riptide also applies Riptide to another friendly target near your Riptide target.

nodes.name: Coalescing Water
nodes.description: Healing Wave and Chain Heal increase the initial healing of your next Riptide by 30%, stacking up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Deeply Rooted Elements
nodes.description:
Each stack of Maelstrom Weapon consumed has a 0.6% chance to activate Ascendance for 6.0 sec.

 Ascendance
Transform into an Air Ascendant for 15 sec and unleash Doom Winds, reducing the cooldown and cost of Stormstrike by 60%, and transforming your auto attack and Stormstrike into Wind attacks which bypass armor and have a 30 yd range.

ranks.description: Riptide has a 6% chance to upgrade your next Healing Stream Totem to Stormstream Totem which heals for 10% more, heals 1 additional ally at 100% effectiveness, and heals 2 injured allies for 5,001 healing when used.
Healing Stream and Stormstream Totem healing increased by 30%.
Casting Nature's Swiftness grants a use of Stormstream Totem and Stormstream Totem no longer consumes a charge of Healing Stream Totem when used.

choices.name: Oversized Totems
choices.description: Increases the size and radius of your totems by 15%, and the health of your totems by 30%.

choices.name: Swift Recall
choices.description:
Successfully removing a harmful effect with Tremor Totem or Poison Cleansing Totem, or controlling an enemy with Capacitor Totem or Earthgrab Totem reduces the cooldown of the totem used by 5 sec.

Cannot occur more than once every 20 sec per totem.

choices.name: Pulse Capacitor
choices.description: Increases the healing done by Surging Totem by 25%.

choices.name: Supportive Imbuements
choices.description:
Learn a new weapon imbue, Tidecaller's Guard.

 Tidecaller's Guard
Imbue your shield with the element of Water for 1 hour. Your healing done is increased by 2.0% and the duration of your Healing Stream Totem is increased by 3.0 sec.

nodes.name: Imbuement Mastery
nodes.description: Increases the duration of your Earthliving effect by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Splitstream
nodes.description:
Your Healing Stream Totems heals an additional ally at 30% effectiveness.

Healing Tide Totem healing increased by 25%.

choices.name: Amplification Core
choices.description: While Surging Totem is active, your damage and healing done is increased by 3%.

choices.name: Oversurge
choices.description: Surging Totem deals 50% more damage while Ascendance or Healing Tide Totem is active.

nodes.name: Surging Totem
nodes.description: Summons a totem at the target location that creates a Tremor immediately and every 5.4 sec for 43 Flamestrike damage. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. Lasts 25 sec.

nodes.name: Whirling Elements
nodes.description:
Elemental motes orbit around your Surging Totem. Your abilities consume the motes for enhanced effects. 

Water: Your next Healing Wave also heals an ally inside of your Healing Rain at 50% effectiveness.

Air: The cast time of your next healing spell is reduced by 40%.

Earth: Your next Chain Heal applies Earthliving at 150% effectiveness to all targets hit.

choices.name: Totemic Coordination
choices.description: Chain Heals from Lively Totem and Totemic Rebound are 25% more effective.

choices.name: Earthsurge
choices.description: Allies affected by your Earthliving effect receive 15% increased healing from you.

nodes.name: Lively Totems
nodes.description: When you summon a Healing Tide Totem, Healing Stream Totem, or Spirit Link Totem you cast a free instant Chain Heal at 100% effectiveness.

nodes.name: Totemic Rebound
nodes.description: Chain Heal now jumps to a nearby totem within 20 yards once it reaches its last target, causing the totem to cast Chain Heal on an injured ally within 30 yards for 842. Jumps to 2 nearby targets within 20 yards.

nodes.name: Wind Barrier
nodes.description: If you have a totem active, your totem grants you a shield absorbing 1,833 damage for 30 sec every 30 sec.

nodes.name: Primal Catalyst
nodes.description: Healing Stream Totem and Healing Tide Totem healing has a 8% chance to apply Earthliving to allies it heals.

nodes.name: Elemental Attunement
nodes.description: Mastery increased by 2%.

nodes.name: Totemic Momentum
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Healing Stream Totem by 3 sec.

choices.name: Natural Harmony
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Nature's Guardian by 15 sec and causes it to heal for an additional 10% of your maximum health.

choices.name: Earthen Communion
choices.description: Earth Shield has an additional 3 charges and heals you for 25% more.

nodes.name: Primordial Capacity
nodes.description:
Increases your maximum mana by 10%.

Tidal Waves can now stack up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Spiritwalker's Momentum
nodes.description: Using spells with a cast time increases the duration of Spiritwalker's Grace and Spiritwalker's Aegis by 1 sec, up to a maximum of 4 sec.

choices.name: Latent Wisdom
choices.description: Your Ancestors' spells are 25% more powerful.

choices.name: Ancient Fellowship
choices.description: Ancestors have a 20% chance to call another Ancestor for 8 sec when they depart.

nodes.name: Elemental Reverb
nodes.description: Lava Burst gains an additional charge and deals 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Final Calling
nodes.description:
When an Ancestor departs, they cast Hydrobubble on a nearby injured ally.

 Hydrobubble
Surrounds your target in a protective water bubble for 15 sec.

The shield absorbs the next 1,795 incoming damage, but the absorb amount decays fully over its duration.

nodes.name: Maelstrom Supremacy
nodes.description: Increases the healing done by Healing Wave, Downpour, and Chain Heal by 25%.

choices.name: Heed My Call
choices.description: Ancestors last an additional 4 sec.

choices.name: Routine Communication
choices.description: Riptide has a 15% chance to call an Ancestor to your side for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Offering from Beyond
nodes.description: When an Ancestor is called, they reduce the cooldown of Riptide by 2 sec.

nodes.name: Call of the Ancestors
nodes.description:
Unleash Life calls an Ancestor to your side for 12 sec.

Whenever you cast a healing or damaging spell, the Ancestor will cast a similar spell.

nodes.name: Ancestral Swiftness
nodes.description:
Your next healing or damaging spell is instant, costs no mana, and deals 10% increased damage and healing.

If you know Nature's Swiftness, it is replaced by Ancestral Swiftness and causes Ancestral Swiftness to call an Ancestor to your side for 8 sec.

nodes.name: Mystic Knowledge
nodes.description: Increases the chance for Lava Surge to occur by 20%.

nodes.name: Windspeaker
nodes.description: The cast times of Healing Surge, Chain Heal and Lava Burst are reduced by 10%.

nodes.name: Ancestral Influence
nodes.description: Your Intellect is increased by 1.0% for each Ancestor active.
